caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a studio against a dark gray, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him; the arm features the text "Rode PSA1" printed on its side. Across the sequence, the man looks slightly off-camera, speaking with an expressive facial expression. His mouth is open as he talks, and his eyes shift slightly. In the final segment, he raises his right hand into the frame, gesturing with his palm open as he continues to speak. The camera angle remains a static medium close-up, capturing his head and shoulders throughout the clip.
